scripts.build: npm run validate && astro build && node scripts/generate-deployment-files.mjs && node scripts/validate-output.mjs
scripts.preview: cross-env PUBLIC_SITE_MODE=preview CONTACT_FORM_ENABLED=true PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run build && wrangler dev --env preview --var PUBLIC_SITE_URL:http://127.0.0.1:8787 --var PUBLIC_SITE_MODE:preview --var CONTACT_FORM_ENABLED:true
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-config.mjs && astro sync && node scripts/validate-content.mjs
scripts.deploy:preview: cross-env PUBLIC_SITE_MODE=preview PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://preview.webpilot.studio CONTACT_FORM_ENABLED=true npm run build && wrangler deploy --env preview
scripts.deploy:production: cross-env PUBLIC_SITE_MODE=live npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
